metadata.description: PBrain — personal knowledge brain for your Obsidian vault, as Claude Code skills

plugins.name: pbrain
plugins.description: Personal knowledge brain for your Obsidian vault. Builds and maintains a wikilink-based knowledge graph across your notes — auto-files new content into people, companies, projects, and concepts; enriches entities from ingested sources (articles, meetings, X, PDFs); and keeps back-links in sync so the graph view stays useful. Also works with any markdown tree (Logseq, plain folders). 26 skills. Skills-only distribution; install the pbrain CLI separately for full brain functionality (search, query, sync). Fork of GBrain by Garry Tan.
